candidate_check.description: The macOS system must require that passwords contain a minimum of one numeric character.

check_content_excerpt:
Verify the macOS system is configured to require that passwords contain a minimum of one numeric character with the following command:

/usr/bin/pwpolicy -getaccountpolicies 2> /dev/null | /usr/bin/tail +2 | /usr/bin/xmllint --xpath '//dict/key[text()="policyIdentifier"]/following-sibling::*[1]/text()' - | /usr/bin/grep "requireAlphanumeric" -c

If the result is not "1", this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Configure the macOS system to require that passwords contain a minimum of one numeric character by installing the "com.apple.mobiledevice.passwordpolicy" configuration profile.
title: The macOS system must require that passwords contain a minimum of one numeric character.
